rules.general: Never use Inter. All numeric data, metrics, node statuses, and IPs MUST use JetBrains Mono to reinforce the technical web3/crypto terminal aesthetic.

colors.rules: Avoid pure black (#000000) or pure grays. Everything is tinted slightly cool (obsidian). Neon lime (#ccff00) is the dominant accent, used sparingly for maximum impact.

layout.rules: High density, strict grid hierarchy. Every pixel must be utilized. Use 'border-collapse' style or tight gaps. Avoid large border-radii; keep it sharp to match the terminal aesthetic.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-white/10), zero shadow. Hover state: slight -translate-y-px and border darkens or glows.
surface_strategies.ai_assistant_panel: The 'Tracing Beam' Look. A side drawer or floating panel with an active 1px neon border that signifies 'Alive' AI processing.
surface_strategies.modals: Crystal Glassmorphism. backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 with a 1px solid border-white/10.

buttons.primary: bg-[#ccff00] text-black font-['JetBrains_Mono'] uppercase text-xs tracking-widest hover:bg-[#b3e600] transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white/90 font-['JetBrains_Mono'] uppercase text-xs hover:border-[#ccff00]/50 transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2

charts.style: Recharts with transparent backgrounds, #ccff00 for primary stroke, #00F0FF for secondary. Use linear gradients for area fills (neon to transparent). Grid lines should be very faint (white/5).

ai_insights.style: Subtle #ccff00/10 background, 1px border-[#ccff00]/30, monospace type for anomaly readouts.

motion.hover: Explicit text color changes + border color shifts. No bouncy physics.
motion.animations: Use subtle pulsing for active/online states. The AI assistant typing should mimic terminal text streaming.

testing.requirements: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='refresh-dashboard-btn', data-testid='node-row-1'.

image_urls.description: Use as a fixed background overlay with opacity-5 and mix-blend-screen or overlay to give the app a subtle digital noise/grain texture.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Inject the Fontshare import URL into index.css and configure Tailwind theme to support 'Clash Display', 'Satoshi', and 'JetBrains Mono'.
2. Build a high-density, sharp-edged dashboard (no generic rounded cards). Use flat #111318 surfaces with 1px white/10 borders.
3. Apply JetBrains Mono strictly to all numbers, node IPs, uptime %, and MYST earnings.
4. Use the pulsing neon dot HTML snippet for 'Online' node status. Use static red/amber dots for offline/degraded.
5. The AI Assistant should be designed as a technical copilot. Place it in a right-panel drawer or persistent sidebar. Give it terminal-style chat bubbles.
6. Do NOT use Shadcn's default heavy drop-shadows. This design is flat and border-driven.
7. Implement all requested functionalities: Overview metrics, Node Grid/List, Earnings Chart, Bandwidth Chart, AI panel, AI Insights card.
8. Ensure EVERY interactive element has a `data-testid`.
